mapper.sql: id, version_id, job_id, status, passed, items, validated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_validation_result WHERE version_id = #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY validated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_validation_result (id, version_id, job_id, status, passed, items, validated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{passed}, #{itemsJson}, #{validatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
